Off Calendar Aug-21-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-03-2017 Continued To Sep-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden (via CourtCall) for petitioner Kathleen Morello.

Ms. McFadden advised the Court that she had filed a declaration last week updating the Court on efforts to bring the estate to a close. She stated that it was a simple estate with assets of $195,000, but that the executor had experienced problems transferring an IRA account into the estate. Also, the executor had given late notice to two health care providers, who thereafter had four months to assert a claim, and the claims period has not yet run. She requested a continuance to allow the claims period to pass before filing of the petition for distribution. The Court stated that he would need either the filing of a status report or a waiver of accounting. Ms. McFadden replied that she had received waivers of accounting from all the residuary beneficiaries of the estate. She said she could get the petition on file within 30-60 days. The matter was continued to September 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Continued To Jul-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Co-Executors.

Ms. McFadden stated that she just came on board on May 8th, that she filed the inventory on May 10th and that she just received the statements from her Clients on Friday. Status on close of estate is continued to July 3, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Continued To Jun-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Steven Weinkauf.

Ms. McFadden stated that she is in the process of filing a Substitution of Attorney, that Mr. Weinkauf and all of the Co-Executors have signed off, that they have finished the inventory and appraisal, and that that she will be able to file a Petition for Final Distribution within 30-days. Status on close of the Estate is continued to June 5, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-01-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Continued To May-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Co-Executors to appear on May 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why an Inventory and Appraisal, and a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration have not been filed. Status on close of the Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Continued To Sep-29-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf in Propria Persona.

The Court asked if the grandchildren lived with their parents. Mr. Weinkauf stated that they do not. The Court stated that notice needs to be amended and sent to their respective residences. Mr. Weinkauf stated that he was told to send the notice to their parents and suggest filing a request for special notice. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was continued to September 29, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado: Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
